gameDescription: Your Bizarre Adventure is a popular Roblox game based on JoJo's Bizarre Adventure.
howToRedeem: Launch Your Bizarre Adventure in Roblox
Click the Menu button on the left side
Enter the code in the text box
Click Redeem to claim your reward

faq.question: How often are new YBA codes released?
faq.answer: New codes are typically released during major updates, events, and milestones. Check back regularly for the latest codes.

faq.question: Why is my YBA code not working?
faq.answer: Codes may have expired, are case-sensitive, or may have already been redeemed on your account. Make sure to enter the code exactly as shown.
